      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Nyarin nilai De  ...\n",
            "\n",
            "Nilai De yang cocok : 2.436 meter\n",
            "Spasi PVD (S) pola segitiga : 2.320 meter\n",
            "Saran desain (bulat ke bawah): 2.30 meter\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "import math\n",
        "\n",
        "target_nilai = 16.95\n",
        "\n",
        "De = 1.0\n",
        "step = 0.001\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Nyarin nilai De  ...\\n\")\n",
        "\n",
        "while True:\n",
        "    hasil = (De**2) * (math.log(De) + 1.968)\n",
        "\n",
        "    if hasil >= target_nilai:\n",
        "        break\n",
        "\n",
        "    De += step\n",
        "\n",
        "spasi_S = De / 1.05\n",
        "\n",
        "print(f\"Nilai De yang cocok : {De:.3f} meter\")\n",
        "print(f\"Spasi PVD (S) pola segitiga : {spasi_S:.3f} meter\")\n",
        "print(f\"Saran desain (bulat ke bawah): {math.floor(spasi_S * 10) / 10:.2f} meter\")"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import math\n",
        "\n",
        "# PARAMETER INPUT (Bisa diganti-ganti)\n",
        "\n",
        "tinggi_timbunan = 5.9\n",
        "lebar_atas = 9.0\n",
        "kemiringan_H = 1.5\n",
        "gamma_timbunan = 18.0\n",
        "\n",
        "# Parameter Profil Tanah\n",
        "H1 = 3.0\n",
        "E1 = 1500.0\n",
        "\n",
        "H2 = 1.5\n",
        "E2 = 2500.0\n",
        "\n",
        "H3 = 18.0\n",
        "E3 = 1700.0\n",
        "\n",
        "q = tinggi_timbunan * gamma_timbunan\n",
        "a = lebar_atas / 2.0\n",
        "b = kemiringan_H * tinggi_timbunan\n",
        "\n",
        "print(f\"PARAMETER BEBAN\")\n",
        "print(f\"Beban Maksimum (q) : {q:.2f} kPa\")\n",
        "print(f\"Setengah lebar (a) : {a:.2f} m\")\n",
        "print(f\"Lebar lereng (b)   : {b:.2f} m\\n\")\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def hitung_delta_sigma(z, q, a, b):\n",
        "    term1 = (a + b) / b\n",
        "    term2 = math.atan((a + b) / z)\n",
        "    term3 = (a / b)\n",
        "    term4 = math.atan(a / z)\n",
        "\n",
        "    delta_sigma = (2 * q / math.pi) * ((term1 * term2) - (term3 * term4))\n",
        "    return delta_sigma\n",
        "\n",
        "print(f\"HASIL PENURUNAN \")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Lapisan 1 (Clay 1)\n",
        "z1 = H1 / 2.0\n",
        "ds1 = hitung_delta_sigma(z1, q, a, b)\n",
        "S1 = (ds1 / E1) * H1\n",
        "print(f\"Lapisan 1 (Clay) -> z = {z1} m  | Tegangan = {ds1:.2f} kPa | Turun = {S1:.4f} m\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Lapisan 2 (Sand)\n",
        "z2 = H1 + (H2 / 2.0)\n",
        "ds2 = hitung_delta_sigma(z2, q, a, b)\n",
        "S2 = (ds2 / E2) * H2\n",
        "print(f\"Lapisan 2 (Sand) -> z = {z2} m | Tegangan = {ds2:.2f} kPa | Turun = {S2:.4f} m\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Lapisan 3 (Clay 2)\n",
        "z3 = H1 + H2 + (H3 / 2.0)\n",
        "ds3 = hitung_delta_sigma(z3, q, a, b)\n",
        "S3 = (ds3 / E3) * H3\n",
        "print(f\"Lapisan 3 (Clay) -> z = {z3} m | Tegangan = {ds3:.2f} kPa  | Turun = {S3:.4f} m\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Total Penurunan\n",
        "S_total = S1 + S2 + S3\n",
        "print(f\"--------------------------------------------------\")\n",
        "print(f\"TOTAL PENURUNAN TANAH (S_total) = {S_total:.4f} meter\")\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },

            "HASIL PENURUNAN \n",
            "Lapisan 1 (Clay) -> z = 1.5 m  | Tegangan = 105.85 kPa | Turun = 0.2117 m\n",
            "Lapisan 2 (Sand) -> z = 3.75 m | Tegangan = 102.16 kPa | Turun = 0.0613 m\n",
            "Lapisan 3 (Clay) -> z = 13.5 m | Tegangan = 68.47 kPa  | Turun = 0.7250 m\n",

            "TOTAL PENURUNAN TANAH (S_total) = 0.9980 meter\n"

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# 1. PARAMETER INPUT (Sesuai Soal & NPM)\n",
        "Tv = 0.848\n",
        "\n",
        "# LAPISAN 1 (CLAY 1)\n",
        "\n",
        "H_clay1 = 3.0\n",
        "H_dr1 = H_clay1 / 2.0\n",
        "Cv1 = 1e-7\n",
        "\n",
        "# LAPISAN 3 (CLAY 2)\n",
        "Y = 8\n",
        "H_clay2 = 10.0 + Y\n",
        "H_dr2 = H_clay2\n",
        "Cv2 = float(f\"1.{Y}e-7\")\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. PERHITUNGAN WAKTU KONSOLIDASI ALAMI (t)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Hitung waktu dalam satuan detik\n",
        "t1_detik = (Tv * (H_dr1**2)) / Cv1\n",
        "t2_detik = (Tv * (H_dr2**2)) / Cv2\n",
        "\n",
        "def konversi_waktu(detik):\n",
        "    bulan = detik / (30 * 24 * 3600)\n",
        "    tahun = detik / (365 * 24 * 3600)\n",
        "    return bulan, tahun\n",
        "\n",
        "t1_bulan, t1_tahun = konversi_waktu(t1_detik)\n",
        "t2_bulan, t2_tahun = konversi_waktu(t2_detik)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"--- WAKTU KONSOLIDASI LAPISAN 1 (CLAY 1) ---\")\n",
        "print(f\"Kondisi        : Double Drainage (Hdr = {H_dr1} m)\")\n",
        "print(f\"Waktu (t1)     : {t1_detik:.0f} detik\")\n",
        "print(f\"Konversi waktu : {t1_bulan:.2f} bulan ({t1_tahun:.2f} tahun)\\n\")\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"--- WAKTU KONSOLIDASI LAPISAN 3 (CLAY 2) ---\")\n",
        "print(f\"Kondisi        : Single Drainage (Hdr = {H_dr2} m)\")\n",
        "print(f\"Waktu (t2)     : {t2_detik:.0f} detik\")\n",
        "print(f\"Konversi waktu : {t2_bulan:.2f} bulan ({t2_tahun:.2f} tahun)\\n\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Penentuan waktu terlama (kritis)\n",
        "if t2_detik > t1_detik:\n",
        "    waktu_kritis = t2_tahun\n",
        "    lapisan_kritis = \"Lapisan 3 (Clay 2)\"\n",
        "else:\n",
        "    waktu_kritis = t1_tahun\n",
        "    lapisan_kritis = \"Lapisan 1 (Clay 1)\"\n",
        "\n"
      ],

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import math\n",
        "\n",
        "# PARAMETER INPUT\n",
        "\n",
        "# Target Waktu dan Konsolidasi\n",
        "waktu_bulan = 5.0\n",
        "t_detik = waktu_bulan * 30 * 24 * 3600\n",
        "U_target = 0.90\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "H_dr = 18.0\n",
        "Cv = 1.8e-7\n",
        "Ch = 2.0 * Cv\n",
        "\n",
        "# Dimensi PVD\n",
        "lebar_a = 0.100\n",
        "tebal_b = 0.004\n",
        "dw = (2 * (lebar_a + tebal_b)) / math.pi\n",
        "\n",
        "Tv = (Cv * t_detik) / (H_dr**2)\n",
        "\n",
        "pembilang = math.sqrt(4 * Tv / math.pi)\n",
        "penyebut = (1 + (4 * Tv / math.pi)**2.8)**0.179\n",
        "Uv = pembilang / penyebut\n",
        "\n",
        "Uh_target = 1 - (1 - U_target) / (1 - Uv)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"ANALISIS KEBUTUHAN KONSOLIDASI \")\n",
        "print(f\"Target Total Konsolidasi (U) : {U_target*100:.2f}%\")\n",
        "print(f\"Konsolidasi Vertikal (Uv)    : {Uv*100:.2f}%\")\n",
        "print(f\"Target Kebutuhan Horiz (Uh)  : {Uh_target*100:.2f}%\\n\")\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"TRIAL & ERROR\")\n",
        "De = 1.0\n",
        "step = 0.001\n",
        "\n",
        "while True:\n",
        "\n",
        "    Th = (Ch * t_detik) / (De**2)\n",
        "\n",
        "    Fn = math.log(De / dw) - 0.75\n",
        "\n",
        "    Uh_calc = 1 - math.exp(-8 * Th / Fn)\n",
        "\n",
        "    if Uh_calc < Uh_target:\n",
        "        De -= step\n",
        "        break\n",
        "\n",
        "    De += step\n",
        "\n",
        "S_segitiga = De / 1.05\n",
        "\n",
        "S_praktis = math.floor(S_segitiga * 20) / 20.0\n",
        "\n",
        "print(f\"Hasil Trial & Error didapat De : {De:.3f} meter\")\n",
        "print(f\"Spasi PVD Pola Segitiga (S)    : {S_segitiga:.3f} meter\")\n",
        "print(\"KESIMPULAN DESAIN:\")\n",
        "print(f\"Gunakan PVD dengan Pola      : Segitiga\")\n",
        "print(f\"Spasi PVD (S) Aktual         : {S_segitiga:.3f} m\")\n",
        "print(f\"Saran Spasi di Lapangan      : {S_praktis:.2f} m (dibulatkan ke bawah)\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import math\n",
        "\n",
        "waktu_bulan = np.linspace(0.1, 60, 500)\n",
        "waktu_detik = waktu_bulan * 30 * 24 * 3600\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "H_dr = 18.0\n",
        "Cv = 1.8e-7\n",
        "Ch = 2.0 * Cv\n",
        "\n",
        "De = 2.44\n",
        "dw = 0.066\n",
        "\n",
        "Tv_alami = (Cv * waktu_detik) / (H_dr**2)\n",
        "U_alami = np.where(Tv_alami <= 0.286,\n",
        "                   np.sqrt((4 * Tv_alami) / np.pi),\n",
        "                   1 - 10**(-(Tv_alami + 0.085) / 0.933))\n",
        "\n",
        "Fn = math.log(De / dw) - 0.75\n",
        "Th = (Ch * waktu_detik) / (De**2)\n",
        "Uh = 1 - np.exp(-8 * Th / Fn)\n",
        "\n",
        "U_total_pvd = 1 - (1 - U_alami) * (1 - Uh)\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.plot(waktu_bulan, U_total_pvd * 100, label='Dengan PVD (S = 2.30 m)', color='blue', linewidth=2.5)\n",
        "plt.plot(waktu_bulan, U_alami * 100, label='Tanpa PVD (Alami)', color='red', linestyle='--', linewidth=2)\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.axhline(y=90, color='green', linestyle=':', label='Target 90%')\n",
        "plt.axvline(x=5, color='gray', linestyle=':', label='Batas Waktu 5 Bulan')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.title('Simulasi Penurunan Tanah: Alami vs PVD', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Waktu (Bulan)', fontsize=12)\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Derajat Konsolidasi / Penurunan (%)', fontsize=12)\n",
        "plt.xlim(0, 60)\n",
        "plt.ylim(0, 105)\n",
        "plt.grid(True, linestyle='--', alpha=0.7)\n",
        "plt.legend(loc='lower right', fontsize=11)\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "\n",
        "# PARAMETER AREA SIMULASI\n",
        "\n",
        "lebar_x = np.linspace(-15, 15, 200)\n",
        "kedalaman_z = np.linspace(0.1, 25, 200)\n",
        "X, Z = np.meshgrid(lebar_x, kedalaman_z)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "q = 106.2\n",
        "B = 9.0\n",
        "setengah_B = B / 2.0\n",
        "\n",
        "sudut_alpha = np.arctan((X + setengah_B) / Z) - np.arctan((X - setengah_B) / Z)\n",
        "sudut_beta = np.arctan((X - setengah_B) / Z)\n",
        "\n",
        "Delta_Sigma_Z = (q / np.pi) * (sudut_alpha + np.sin(sudut_alpha) * np.cos(sudut_alpha + 2 * sudut_beta))\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 8))\n",
        "\n",
        "kontur = plt.contourf(X, Z, Delta_Sigma_Z, levels=20, cmap='jet')\n",
        "plt.colorbar(kontur, label='Tegangan Tambahan (kPa)')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.axhline(y=3.0, color='white', linestyle='--', linewidth=2, label='Batas Clay 1 & Sand')\n",
        "plt.axhline(y=4.5, color='white', linestyle='-.', linewidth=2, label='Batas Sand & Clay 2')\n",
        "plt.axhline(y=22.5, color='black', linestyle='-', linewidth=3, label='Hard Layer (Batuan Keras)')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.plot([-4.5, 4.5], [0, 0], color='red', linewidth=6, label='Posisi Timbunan Dasar (9m)')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.gca().invert_yaxis()\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.title('Simulasi Kontur Penyebaran Tegangan Timbunan ', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Jarak Horizontal (m)', fontsize=12)\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Kedalaman Tanah (m)', fontsize=12)\n",
        "plt.legend(loc='lower right')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
